untranslatable_reason: Signal requires cointegration analysis and OLS regression statistics (residual z-score, R-squared coefficient from pair regression). These are advanced multivariate statistical measures not available in the standard indicator library. The signal requires: (1) calculation of residual spread from cointegrated pair using OLS regression, (2) z-score normalization of that residual using 100-bar lookback, (3) R-squared validation (>0.60). Standard price/technical indicators cannot replicate this derivation.
translation_notes: This is a pairs trading signal using statistical cointegration that requires external calculation of the cointegrated residual and its z-score. The allowed indicator set does not include: residual_zscore, cointegration_ratio, pair_spread, or regression_r_squared. Implementation would require a custom indicator pre-calculated in the data pipeline before backtest engine processes it.
